parametrics.parameterDescr: Barrel length (descriptive text, not a unit-bearing quantity).
Caliber (descriptive text, not a unit-bearing quantity).
Country or countries where the system was designed/originates.
Organization credited with the system's design.
Effective firing range (descriptive text, not a unit-bearing quantity).
Period during which the system has been/was in active service.
Overall length of the system.
Company or companies that manufacture the system.
Overall mass of the system.
Muzzle velocity (descriptive text, not a unit-bearing quantity).
System type/role classification.
Known operators of the system.
Action (descriptive text, not a unit-bearing quantity).
Ammo (descriptive text, not a unit-bearing quantity).
Barrels (descriptive text, not a unit-bearing quantity).
Cartridge (descriptive text, not a unit-bearing quantity).
Feed system (descriptive text, not a unit-bearing quantity).
Maximum firing range (descriptive text, not a unit-bearing quantity).
Production period.
Rate of fire (descriptive text, not a unit-bearing quantity).
Shell (descriptive text, not a unit-bearing quantity).
Named variants of the base system.
Width (descriptive text, not a unit-bearing quantity).
